main.summary: Background worker that processes queued cache item requests.
main.remarks: Reads CacheItemRequest messages from CacheQueue and writes them to CoreCache with retry and backoff policies.

field.name: CoreCache
field.summary: CoreCache service instance used for cache operations.
field.returns: The CoreCache instance or null if not yet resolved.

field.name: Queue
field.summary: Queue that supplies cache item requests.

field.name: CoreCacheFactory
field.summary: Factory used to create CoreCache instances.

field.name: ProcessPolicy
field.summary: Retry policy applied to cache write operations.

field.name: ItemBlock
field.summary: Action block that processes CacheItemRequest messages concurrently.

constructor.name: Constructor
constructor.param: Factory used to create CoreCache instances.

method.name: ReadItemChannelAsync
method.summary: Continuously reads cache item requests from the queue and forwards them to the action block.
method.param: Cancellation token that stops reading from the channel.
method.returns: Task representing the channel read loop.

method.name: ExecuteItemCoreCacheAsync
method.summary: Execute a cache write operation against CoreCache with timeout and retry.
method.param: Cache item request containing data and diagnostics.
method.returns: True if the operation completed without throwing inside the retry policy.

method.name: GetRandomDelay
method.summary: Compute a random delay between the configured jitter bounds.

method.name: ResolveCoreCache
method.summary: Resolve the CoreCache instance from the factory if it has not yet been created.

field.name: CacheProcessFail
field.summary: Log message used when cache processing fails.

field.name: ResolveCacheFail
field.summary: Log message used when CoreCache resolution fails.
